description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Publish Docker Image that triggers on push to tags matching v3.*.* and on prereleased events. The workflow should have concurrency control, cancelling any in-progress jobs for the same workflow and event. In an ubuntu-latest job, checkout the code, fetch tags, extract the Git tag or branch name, and use it to construct a Docker tag. Set up QEMU, Docker Build, and login to DockerHub using provided secrets. Then, build and push the Docker image using the constructed tag and display the image digest.
